content:
Hello guys.

I've been having this issue on both of my Android devices where after clearing the boss stage, my game just freezes instead of proceeding to the post clear screen with the affinity stuff. The clear still registers (fortunately), though it now requires restarting the game to play other stages, which can be annoying. 

I haven't played much, but this happened on both event and Dtide. First time encountering this issue was probably this Tuesday, as I don't recall it happening when I cleared Pdive this Monday. I haven't done any troubleshoots yet. I asked on the other EN Discord server if they encountered the same issue, and 1 replied an affirmative.

I included a recording below.

It's somewhat inconvenient that more than half of all Covenant sets are locked behind limited currency that is often more preferably spent on limited items like character/wheel dupes, Quills, Mimetic Crystals, **pulls and Prototype Horizon/Timeloop Copy**, among others. The ability to directly farm those Covenants from Interlude stages would be much appreciated.

Alternatively, you could introduce more ways to get D-Jewels, Badges and Black Offerings besides Weekly Quests, Arcade and D-Tide (I don't believe Sediment shop really counts for the last two since they still have a timed purchase limit there, plus Sediments are preferably saved for pulls, wheels and Prototypes/Timeloops).
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Make Interlude stages for all Covenant sets (or give more ways to get Exchange currency)
